calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert T. Roddick, via Zoom, for and with Ann Wood-Gray, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel offers advocacy for the preliminary distribution without a court order stating that all parties agreed to the distribution. Counsel reports on Estate funds being held in one bank account that exceeds the FDIC coverage limit. The court reminds counsel of its position regarding making unauthorized distributions.

After brief, additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-05-2022 Continued To Jan-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-24-2021 Continued To Jan-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Robert Roddick, Esq. for Ann Wood-Gray, Administrator;
No other appearance on this matter.

Mr. Roddick addressed the delay stating that a Mr. Shiono held a 60% interest in the property, that Mr. Shiono was going to buy the house but he passed away, that he is speaking with Mr. Shiono's son, and that he was hoping that the two heirs would be protected by this Court scrutinizing the sale. Mr. Roddick also stated that at this point that it appears that it will be easier to pass it on, and then have a private sale. Mr. Roddick confirmed for the Court that a supplemental inventory and appraisal was filed when George Murakami's property came into the estate.

At the conclusion of Mr. Roddick's comments, the Court continued today's status on close of the estate to Wednesday, January 5, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of a report of status of administration is to be on file by December 29, 2021.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Matter not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-25-2021 Continued To Nov-24-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
